title: hieracium glaucopsis subsp. glaucopsis
intro: Hieracium glaucopsis subsp. glaucopsis, a plant species also known as hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The medicinal properties of Hieracium glaucopsis subsp. glaucopsis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium glaucopsis subsp. glaucopsis include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium glaucopsis subsp. glaucopsis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat digestive issues and skin problems.
